payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Small tabletop table lamp with an off-white, scalloped fabric shade showing radial seams and slight yellowing, a faceted clear-glass decorative base with gold/brass accents; lower base is partially cut off by the image edge and the lamp appears to be approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"table lamp","short_description":"off-white scalloped shade table lamp","long_description":"Small tabletop table lamp with an off-white, scalloped fabric shade showing radial seams and slight yellowing, a faceted clear-glass decorative base with gold/brass accents; lower base is partially cut off by the image edge and the lamp appears to be approximately 0.6 m from the camera.","attributes":["off-white fabric shade","scalloped edge","radial seams/pleated segments","slight yellowing/stain","faceted clear-glass base","gold/brass accents","tabletop scale","bottom partially cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
